implementationSequence.test: groupByArea returns groups for custom areas including a user-added area
implementationSequence.failsFor: groupByArea ignores second parameter, uses hardcoded 5 areas

implementationSequence.test: preserves existing behavior with default 5 areas
shows empty groups for areas with no items
shows progress out of 6 when Carlos has 6 areas
all-areas-complete triggers only after completing all 6
adds a new area that persists in the area list
rejects adding a duplicate area name
newly added area shows items in groupByArea
loads the 5 default areas on a brand new installation

mandateCompliance.CM-A: All test files import through driving ports only: groupByArea, createStapleLibrary, createTrip, createAreaManagement, validateAreaName. Null adapters for storage. Zero internal component imports.
mandateCompliance.CM-B: Gherkin and test names use business language exclusively: 'Carlos adds', 'area list contains', 'sweep progress shows'. Zero technical terms (no HTTP verbs, status codes, DB references, JSON).
mandateCompliance.CM-C: 3 walking skeletons (groupByArea custom, sweep progress dynamic, area management add). 28 focused scenarios. Error/edge ratio: 14/31 = 45%.
